title: hieracium bifidum subsp. pseudodollineri
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. pseudodollineri, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, contributing to its health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-microbial, and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Hieracium bifidum subsp. pseudodollineri is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote tissue repair.
